gap_resolutions.title: Embedded preview copy fails closed to summary-first language
gap_resolutions.resolution: When embedded preview capability is ambiguous, the shell must say that the summary remains governed while preview waits for a safer browser or secure-send-later path.

gap_resolutions.title: Transfer acknowledgement is always provisional
gap_resolutions.resolution: Buttons, browser dialogs, and spawned tabs are expressed as provisional movement until ArtifactTransferSettlement reaches an authoritative state.

gap_resolutions.title: Large artifacts fall back to governed placeholder copy
gap_resolutions.resolution: Large guarded artifacts must keep the verified summary and expose a placeholder sentence instead of pretending inline preview is loading forever.

follow_on_dependencies.description: Bind live patient and staff route families to the shared artifact shell once seed routes publish real SelectedAnchor and route-manifest tuples.
Swap mock navigation grants and telemetry hooks for runtime publication, route-guard, and automation-anchor bindings without changing the shell law.

examples.title: Appointment confirmation
examples.preview_summary: Governed inline preview stays inside the same shell.
examples.return_summary: Return safe via Patient booking timeline.

summary_sections.title: What changed
summary_sections.body: Your appointment has been reserved for Tuesday 16 April at 09:40.
summary_sections.emphasis: The shell can say this with verified confidence.

summary_sections.title: Where to go
summary_sections.body: Community clinic, Floor 2, Room 14. Bring your NHS number and current medications.

summary_sections.title: Support and access
summary_sections.body: Need to change the slot or request support? Use the same booking timeline instead of leaving the shell.

preview_pages.title: Preparation notes
lines: Use the patient booking timeline if you need support.

examples.grant_reason: Scoped browser handoff remains active for the same booking route family.
examples.transfer_label: No external transfer is currently in progress.
examples.parity_statement: The confirmation summary, inline preview, and byte artifact are derived from the same settled booking tuple.

examples.title: Record result summary
examples.preview_summary: Governed inline preview stays inside the same shell.
examples.return_summary: Return safe via Patient record result list.
reason_trail: Parity is provisional or stale, so the shell must say so before preview is trusted.

summary_sections.title: Headline reading
summary_sections.body: HbA1c remains above target and the care note was updated five minutes ago.
summary_sections.emphasis: Provisional parity remains visible beside the summary.

summary_sections.title: What to do next
summary_sections.body: Review the new care note with your clinician or wait for the final record publication.

summary_sections.title: Source authority
summary_sections.body: The source PDF is available, but the summary remains marked provisional until parity settles.

examples.grant_reason: A scoped grant exists, but the shell still presents parity as provisional.
examples.transfer_label: Preview remains in the shell until parity refresh completes.
examples.parity_statement: The summary reflects the latest safe parsed result, but a fresh clinician annotation is still reconciling with the source PDF.
examples.drift_reason: Annotation digest pending publication parity refresh.

examples.title: Release evidence pack
examples.preview_summary: Structured summary remains the primary governed surface.
examples.return_summary: Return safe via Governance release board.
reason_trail: Embedded channel posture fails closed to same-shell summary.
Byte delivery posture blocks inline preview and download.

summary_sections.title: Pack scope
summary_sections.body: Evidence includes release parity, resilience checks, rollback readiness, and approval notes.

summary_sections.title: Current law
summary_sections.body: This embedded channel cannot safely host preview or print, so the verified summary remains the legal surface.
summary_sections.emphasis: No raw browser action is inferred from byte availability.

summary_sections.title: Next path
summary_sections.body: Open the same route in a safer browser or request a secure-send-later path from governance tools.

examples.grant_reason: Grant exists, but the embedded host still fails closed to summary-first posture.
examples.transfer_label: No handoff starts while the host remains embedded.
examples.parity_statement: The pack remains verified, but this embedded posture cannot safely present preview or print.

examples.title: Readiness handoff summary
examples.preview_summary: Structured summary remains the primary governed surface.
examples.return_summary: Return safe via Operations readiness cockpit.

summary_sections.title: Release state
summary_sections.body: All mandatory checks passed, but the external readiness workspace still owns final acknowledgement.

summary_sections.title: Continuity
summary_sections.body: The evidence row and return target stay visible while the handoff is pending.
summary_sections.emphasis: Click acknowledgement does not equal successful handoff.

summary_sections.title: Return target
summary_sections.body: If the handoff returns, focus restores to the operations readiness cockpit row.

examples.grant_reason: Short-lived handoff grant remains scoped to the same route family and return target.
examples.transfer_label: Handoff is pending authoritative settlement; the shell still owns continuity.
examples.parity_statement: The handoff summary and source evidence bundle are tied to the same readiness tuple and current release freeze state.

examples.title: Recovery report
examples.preview_summary: Recovery posture replaces preview while the last safe summary stays visible.
examples.return_summary: Return-safe continuity is not lawful, so the shell stays in place and surfaces recovery instead of departing.
reason_trail: Expired navigation grant blocks print or handoff without leaving the shell.

summary_sections.title: Incident summary
summary_sections.body: Projection rebuild completed, but operator sign-off still needs a fresh print grant.

summary_sections.title: Why print changed
summary_sections.body: The print dialog opened locally, but that acknowledgement is provisional and not authoritative completion.
summary_sections.emphasis: Grant expiry beats local browser feedback.

summary_sections.title: Safe next step
summary_sections.body: Request a fresh print grant from the same recovery board if a physical packet is still required.

preview_pages.title: Print-safe preview
lines: Print posture blocked by expired grant

examples.grant_reason: The print grant has expired, so the shell must fail closed to summary-first posture.
examples.transfer_label: Print attempt downgraded to in-place recovery after grant expiry.
examples.parity_statement: The recovery report remains verified, but print cannot stay armed after the scoped grant expires.
examples.drift_reason: Print grant expired before authoritative dialog settlement.

examples.title: Record attachment
examples.preview_summary: A governed placeholder replaces preview while the verified summary remains primary.
examples.return_summary: Return safe via Patient record attachment list.
reason_trail: Large guarded bytes downgrade preview to a governed placeholder.

summary_sections.title: Attachment scope
summary_sections.body: Uploaded MRI image bundle, 164 MB, linked to the same appointment and record tuple.

summary_sections.title: Preview posture
summary_sections.body: Inline preview is deferred because large media would otherwise dominate the shell and overclaim readiness.

summary_sections.title: Secondary actions
summary_sections.body: Governed download remains available, but the summary and return target stay primary.

preview_pages.title: Attachment placeholder
lines: Large attachment remains bound to governed summary
Use download if byte access is still needed

examples.grant_reason: Download remains available as a secondary governed action.
examples.transfer_label: The shell can prepare governed download while preview remains placeholder-only.
examples.parity_statement: The summary is verified, but the inline preview is intentionally deferred because the attachment is too large for quiet same-shell rendering.
